summary: Usability and RBAC stabilization release for weekly timesheets, sidebar permissions, and PM project role syncing.

notes: Role-specific sidebar order is stored on existing role_permissions rows; no new table is required.
System management is restored as a sidebar resource while permission configuration remains a separate employee-organization resource.
PM project owner assignments sync platform role lead; PM department owner assignments sync platform role manager.
The PM role sync RPC avoids ambiguous employee_id references and backfills existing project role assignments.
My weekly timesheet opens with an initial project row and adds a new project block automatically when the week reaches six workdays.
Admin permission configuration supports drag sorting of sidebar entries per role.
Sidebar default order is dashboard, approval center, weekly timesheet, leave request, project list, employee and organization, app center.
Employee and organization top-level duplicate headings were removed to move the main content upward.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.15.2 and app image tag approval-app:V0.15.2.

verification: Verify approval-app and approval-nginx are healthy.
Verify the cloud homepage returns HTTP 200.
